content_of_post_to_comment:
Hello everyone!

I am a 22 year old Male looking for a succes partner I would like to call it. To grow to succes.

If you are a male or female I don’t mind, what I do mind is that we make a agreement even with some financial in it. So that we have consequenses if I fall my part of the agreement.

This is where I want to get a good routine:
Being social with friends and going out
Work on my business as a social media videographer
Succeed at my half triathlon at the end of the summer

And most importantely

Don’t was much time on my phone or laptop on youtube.

If you are somebody that also wants to work on improvement on yourself I would like to help you.

The best way for me is every day have a quik conversation with a reflection how your day went or that we are both starting or day with some sports and the other way around.

I woud love to know what you’re goals are and see how we can help each other. I believe in change and it would be cool to share this experience with someone.

Greetings,

Rick
comment: Relying on financial consequences with a stranger can get messy fast. Accountability works better when its simple and low-stakes, like shared check-ins or a training app group for your triathlon prep. I’ve seen people burn out when the system becomes about punishment instead of consistency. What’s your plan if one of you starts slipping early on?
